name: polinema_tools
description: Tools for accessing Polinema SIAKAD and LMS data

tools.name: get_biodata_mahasiswa
tools.description: Get student biodata/profile information from SIAKAD

returns.description: Student biodata including NIM, name, program, etc.

tools.name: get_kehadiran
tools.description: Get attendance/presence data for all courses

returns.description: Attendance records with present, absent, and permission counts per course

tools.name: get_kalender_akademik
tools.description: Get academic calendar with important dates and events

returns.description: List of academic events with dates and descriptions
Grades for all courses with GPA information

tools.name: get_jadwal_kuliah
tools.description: Get class schedule for current semester

returns.description: List of classes with time, room, and lecturer information

tools.name: get_all_data
tools.description: Get all SIAKAD data at once (biodata, kehadiran, kalender, nilai, jadwal)

authentication.description: Authentication is handled automatically by the server using stored credentials
